category_sources: Official CHICKEN site says CHICKEN is a compiler for Scheme that produces portable C.
source_facts.description says CHICKEN is a compiler for the Scheme programming language.
display_name_sources: Official project site brands the project as CHICKEN and links CHICKEN Scheme documentation.
source_facts.name is chicken, while the official context is Scheme.
docs_sources: Official CHICKEN site says the wiki, manual, and API reference provide updated detailed documentation.
Official CHICKEN wiki states it was created to provide documentation for CHICKEN.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CHICKEN source code page says the core compiler, interpreter, and libraries are maintained in a git repository and gives the HTTPS clone URL.
tags_sources: Official CHICKEN site describes compiling Scheme to C and also interpreting Scheme programs.
